scenario.title: Battery capacity degraded below threshold due to prior unauthorized repair
scenario.description: Customer’s iPhone battery capacity has depleted more than 50%, but the device was previously repaired by a third party, not an Apple Authorized Service Provider, raising questions about coverage eligibility.

service_fee.notes: Battery service for depletion over 50% is covered without service fee if eligible.

policy_references.snippet: Coverage includes repair or exchange if battery capacity depleted 50% or more from original specifications.
Plan does not apply if service was performed by anyone other than Apple or an Apple Authorized Service Provider.
Customer must provide detailed information including serial number and history relevant to coverage evaluation.

scenario.reasoning: Battery replacement claim is valid per section 3.1 if capacity <50%. However, section 4.2(ii)(d) excludes coverage if unauthorized repair altered the device, creating tension. Detailed device history is required to determine if the earlier unauthorized repair disqualifies this claim or if battery degradation alone qualifies. The service fee does not apply to battery degradation claims. Apple must evaluate the device’s condition and repair history to exercise discretion.

system_prompts.customer:
You are a policyholder filing a claim with AppleCare.
You are given a persona and a scenario to role-play as the policyholder. Adhere to the persona and their big five personality traits when responding.
You will have a conversation with an AppleCare bot to file your claim.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique. Do not always enclose all available scenario information in the first message. Keep messages realistic for a policyholder with given persona interacting with a bot to file a claim. Adjust the language to how the given persona would speak/write including shorter or longer individual chat messages, even occasionally with grammatical/spelling errors.
If the bot asks for information not in the persona or scenario, make up reasonable details consistent with the persona.
When the bot ends the conversation, or you want to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.

Scenario description:
Customer’s iPhone battery capacity has depleted more than 50%, but the device was previously repaired by a third party, not an Apple Authorized Service Provider, raising questions about coverage eligibility.

system_prompts.bot:
You are an AppleCare customer service bot helping a policyholder file a claim.
Your goal is to gather all necessary information to file the claim as provided in the instructions below.
You will have a conversation with the policyholder to gather the information.
Do NOT give any information about whether the claim is covered or not. Your job is to gather the information only. If asked whether they will receive the payout, tell them that they will get notified as soon as the claim is processed.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique.
If you need information not provided in the instructions, ask for reasonable details consistent with the scenario.
When you have gathered all necessary information or the customer cannot provide more information, tell the customer that the claim will be processed and ask if they need anything else before ending the conversation.
If the customer wants to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.
Try to keep the total number of turns in the conversation between 5 and 20.
Remain professional and friendly throughout the conversation. Keep the language concise and clear.

Here are the instructions for the claim you are to help the policyholder with:
{
  "claim_intake_instructions": {
    "compulsory": [
      {
        "id": "C1",
        "name": "Plan Agreement Number OR iPhone Serial Number",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, at the beginning of claim intake",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 5",
        "notes": "Used to validate coverage eligibility."
      },
      {
        "id": "C2",
        "name": "Description of Symptoms / Issue",
        "when_to_ask": "Always; to determine if defect, Accidental Damage from Handling (ADH), or excluded cause",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(ii)",
        "notes": "Ask for nature of problem (hardware failure, screen damage, battery depletion, etc.)."
      },
      {
        "id": "C3",
        "name": "Responses to Diagnostic Questions",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, after issue description",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(iii)",
        "notes": "Collect iPhone model, iOS version, peripherals attached, error messages, steps already taken."
      }
    ],
    "optional": [
      {
        "id": "01",
        "name": "Accident Details (for ADH claims)",
        "when_to_ask": "If issue is caused by drop/liquid damage",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.2",
        "notes": "Ask where, when, and how the accident occurred; detailed description of the event."
      },
      {
        "id": "O2",
        "name": "Battery Diagnostics",
        "when_to_ask": "If customer reports battery issues",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.1",
        "notes": "Confirm battery capacity has dropped ≥50%."
      },
      {
        "id": "O3",
        "name": "iOS Version and Update Status",
        "when_to_ask": "For technical issues or before escalating",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(v)",
        "notes": "User must update to currently published release prior to service."
      },
      {
        "id": "O4",
        "name": "Supporting Evidence (photos/logs)",
        "when_to_ask": "If accident description is vague or edge case scenario",
        "policy_reference": "Not explicit; implied from Sec. 3.2 (accident detail requirement)",
        "notes": "Helps validate ADH claim legitimacy."
      },
      {
        "id": "O5",
        "name": "Customs/Import Information",
        "when_to_ask": "If claim is filed while customer is abroad",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 6.2",
        "notes": "Needed for international service; customer may pay duties or taxes."
      }
    ],
    "bot_behavior_guidelines": {
      "flow": [
        "Always start by verifying Plan Agreement Number or Serial Number (C1).",
        "Ask user to describe the issue (C2).",
        "Follow up with diagnostic questions (C3).",
        "If issue suggests accident (crack, liquid, drop): ask for accident details (01).",
        "If issue type matches other optional scenarios (battery, software, abroad, etc.): request corresponding optional info (O2–O5)."
      ],
      "tone": "Supportive, concise, guiding user step-by-step.",
      "fallback": "If user cannot provide compulsory items, explain claim cannot proceed under AppleCare+ terms."
    }
  }
}

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Hi! I need to file a claim for my iPhone, but I have a concern. The battery's been depleting more than 50%, and I heard it might have been repaired by a third-party before. Will that affect my coverage?
messages.raw_text: Hi! I need to file a claim for my iPhone, but I have a concern. The battery's been depleting more than 50%, and I heard it might have been repaired by a third-party before. Will that affect my coverage?

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: I understand your concern. To start the claim process, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or the serial number of your iPhone?
messages.raw_text: I understand your concern. To start the claim process, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or the serial number of your iPhone?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Sure, my serial number is G6N4H9K2L1R7 and the plan agreement number is APLCARE-5947382010. Thanks for helping me out!
messages.raw_text: Sure, my serial number is G6N4H9K2L1R7 and the plan agreement number is APLCARE-5947382010. Thanks for helping me out!

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for providing the serial number and plan agreement number. Can you please describe the specific issue you're experiencing with your iPhone?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for providing the serial number and plan agreement number. Can you please describe the specific issue you're experiencing with your iPhone?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Yeah, the main thing is, the battery just drain super fast now, over 50% gone quickly. I get it’s been fixed elsewhere before, but I need to know if I can still get it looked at under warranty.
messages.raw_text: Yeah, the main thing is, the battery just drain super fast now, over 50% gone quickly. I get it’s been fixed elsewhere before, but I need to know if I can still get it looked at under warranty.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for describing the issue. To better understand the problem, could you tell me if you've noticed any error messages, or if you've already tried any troubleshooting steps? Additionally, do you know which iOS version your device is running?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for describing the issue. To better understand the problem, could you tell me if you've noticed any error messages, or if you've already tried any troubleshooting steps? Additionally, do you know which iOS version your device is running?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: I haven't seen any error messages, and I haven't done much troubleshooting yet. As for the iOS version, I think it's the latest update, but I can check quickly... Okay, it's running iOS 17.0.1. I usually keep my phone updated.
messages.raw_text: I haven't seen any error messages, and I haven't done much troubleshooting yet. As for the iOS version, I think it's the latest update, but I can check quickly... Okay, it's running iOS 17.0.1. I usually keep my phone updated.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Great, thank you for that information. Before we proceed, can you confirm if your battery capacity has dropped by 50% or more? If you're unsure, I can guide you on how to check this on your device.
messages.raw_text: Great, thank you for that information. Before we proceed, can you confirm if your battery capacity has dropped by 50% or more? If you're unsure, I can guide you on how to check this on your device.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Yes, I’ve noticed the battery life is pretty weak now, and it seems like it's lost over half of its capacity. I haven't checked the exact percentage, but it's definitely not holding up like it used to. I’d appreciate if you could tell me how to check it properly.
messages.raw_text: Yes, I’ve noticed the battery life is pretty weak now, and it seems like it's lost over half of its capacity. I haven't checked the exact percentage, but it's definitely not holding up like it used to. I’d appreciate if you could tell me how to check it properly.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Certainly! To check your battery capacity, please go to Settings > Battery > Battery Health on your iPhone. You'll see the maximum capacity percentage there. If it is 50% or lower, that confirms significant battery degradation. Would you like me to proceed with filing your claim now?
messages.raw_text: Certainly! To check your battery capacity, please go to Settings > Battery > Battery Health on your iPhone. You'll see the maximum capacity percentage there. If it is 50% or lower, that confirms significant battery degradation. Would you like me to proceed with filing your claim now?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Yes, please go ahead and start the claim. I just want to get this sorted out, especially since my battery’s pretty much at that 50% mark now. Thanks.
messages.raw_text: Yes, please go ahead and start the claim. I just want to get this sorted out, especially since my battery’s pretty much at that 50% mark now. Thanks.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: You're welcome. I will now proceed with filing your claim. Please hold on a moment while I gather the necessary details.
messages.raw_text: You're welcome. I will now proceed with filing your claim. Please hold on a moment while I gather the necessary details.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Thank you. I appreciate your help with this. Just let me know if you need anything else from my side.
messages.raw_text: Thank you. I appreciate your help with this. Just let me know if you need anything else from my side.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for your patience. Your claim has been successfully submitted. You will be notified as soon as it is processed. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for your patience. Your claim has been successfully submitted. You will be notified as soon as it is processed. Is there anything else I can assist you with today? <END>
